name: TĀHIRA - smooth floral warmth
description:
Tāhira is a refined feminine fragrance crafted for women who embody dignity, intelligence, and quiet strength. Inspired by timeless character and enduring elegance, this scent blends warmth and softness into a composition that feels composed, mature, and memorable.

It is not loud.
It is lasting.

Fragrance Profile

Tāhira opens with a smooth floral warmth that feels graceful and poised. As it evolves, soft amber and creamy sandalwood add depth and richness. The base of clean musk settles gently on the skin, leaving behind an elegant and confident trail.

Top Notes: Velvet rose, soft floral accord
Heart Notes: Warm amber, creamy sandalwood
Base Notes: Clean musk, subtle saffron warmth

A floral-amber-woody composition defined by balance and refinement.

When to Wear

Tāhira is ideal for:

• Weddings and formal gatherings
• Evening occasions
• Cultural celebrations
• Signature elegant daily wear

It complements both traditional and modern attire beautifully.

Performance

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum
• Longevity: 6–8 hours (skin dependent)
• Projection: Moderate and refined
• Character: Warm, graceful, composed

Presentation

Encased in a matte-finish bottle with antique-gold detailing, Tāhira reflects the elegance and strength found within the fragrance itself.

Minimal. Timeless. Distinguished.

Why Choose Tāhira?

Tāhira is for women who lead with character, not noise.
It enhances presence without overpowering it.

Wear dignity. Leave legacy.
short_description:
Top Notes: Velvet rose, soft floral accord
Heart Notes: Warm amber, creamy sandalwood
Base Notes: Clean musk, subtle saffron warmth

name: RAFAT - polished, lasting impression.
description:
Rafat is a refined feminine fragrance crafted for women who rise with quiet confidence. Inspired by elevation and inner composure, this scent blends soft florals with warm depth to create an aura that feels graceful yet powerful.

Designed for elegance without excess, Rafat is a fragrance that leaves a polished, lasting impression.

Fragrance Profile

The scent opens with a delicate floral brightness that feels airy and poised. As it develops, warm amber and creamy softness add depth and sophistication. A smooth musk base anchors the fragrance, creating a balanced and memorable trail.

Top Notes: Velvet peony, soft floral accord
Heart Notes: Warm amber, subtle vanilla
Base Notes: Creamy musk, gentle woods

A modern floral-amber blend that feels elevated and timeless.

When to Wear

Rafat is ideal for:

• Weddings & formal gatherings
• Evening occasions
• Special celebrations
• Signature everyday elegance

It complements both traditional and contemporary styles effortlessly.

Performance

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum
• Longevity: 6–8 hours (skin dependent)
• Projection: Moderate, refined
• Character: Warm, elegant, feminine

The Essence

Rafat is not loud glamour.
It is composed elevation.

For the woman who does not chase attention — she carries it naturally.

Base Notes: Creamy musk, gentle woods

name: ADL - Strength in Balance
description:
Adl is a structured masculine fragrance crafted for men who value control over chaos. Inspired by the principle of balance and discipline, this scent blends dry woods, warm depth, and refined spice into a composition that feels composed and commanding.

It does not overpower.
It establishes.

Fragrance Profile

Adl opens with a crisp dryness that feels clean and focused. A heart of structured woods and subtle spice builds clarity and strength. As it settles, warm amber and refined oud create a steady, grounded finish.

Top Notes: Dry woods, black pepper
Heart Notes: Cedarwood, subtle spice
Base Notes: Structured oud, clean amber

A woody-spice fragrance defined by symmetry and control.

When to Wear

Adl is ideal for:

• Professional environments
• Business meetings
• Formal gatherings
• Evening occasions

It complements tailored attire and confident presence.

Performance

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum
• Longevity: 6–8 hours (skin dependent)
• Projection: Moderate and controlled
• Character: Sharp, balanced, authoritative

The Essence

Adl represents strength guided by discipline.

For the man who commands respect without excess.

Base Notes: Structured oud, clean amber

description:
Hilal is a refined fresh-woody fragrance crafted for men stepping into new chapters with clarity and confidence. Inspired by renewal and quiet rise, this scent balances brightness with grounded warmth.

It does not rush.
It unfolds.

Fragrance Profile

Hilal opens with a crisp, clean freshness that feels uplifting yet controlled. Smooth woods and soft amber add depth as the scent develops, while a base of clean musk ensures a polished and lasting finish.

Top Notes: Fresh citrus peel, subtle green accord
Heart Notes: Smooth woods, soft amber
Base Notes: Clean musk, gentle warmth

A fresh-woody composition designed for balance and versatility.

When to Wear

Hilal is ideal for:

• Daily office wear
• Daytime gatherings
• Formal yet light occasions
• Transitional seasons

It complements both modern and traditional attire effortlessly.

Performance

• Projection: Moderate and refined
• Character: Fresh, composed, uplifting

The Essence

Hilal represents beginnings carried with composure.

For the man who rises quietly — and stays remembered.

name: RIDWAAN - Loyalty Is Strength
description:
Ridwaan is a deep, grounded masculine fragrance crafted for men who remain steady through pressure. Inspired by unwavering commitment and strength rooted in character, this scent blends smoky depth with warm structure to create a powerful yet controlled presence.

It does not shift with trends.
It stands firm.

Fragrance Profile

Ridwaan opens with a dark, resinous warmth that feels bold yet refined. Smoked oud and earthy woods build a strong foundation, while subtle amber adds balance and smoothness to the dry down.

Top Notes: Warm resin, subtle spice
Heart Notes: Smoked oud, dark woods
Base Notes: Earthy vetiver, deep amber

A woody-resin composition that feels mature and enduring.

When to Wear

Ridwaan is ideal for:

• Evening occasions
• Formal settings
• Winter seasons
• Signature mature wear

It pairs naturally with confident presence and composed demeanor.

Performance

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum
• Longevity: 7–9 hours (skin dependent)
• Projection: Moderate to strong
• Character: Deep, steady, authoritative

The Essence

Ridwaan reflects strength that does not waver.

For the man whose loyalty defines him — and whose presence leaves weight.

name: AaMEEN – Eau De Parfum
description:
Ameen by AnsarOud is a premium oud perfume for men designed to embody calm strength, composure, and quiet dignity. Inspired by the inner balance of character and presence, this fragrance blends soft woods, warm amber warmth, and clean musk into a scent that feels grounded yet uplifting.

Perfect for daily wear or thoughtful evenings, Ameen is a fragrance that supports confidence without noise — subtle, refined, and timeless.

Fragrance Profile – Calmed & Balanced

Ameen opens with a gentle introduction of soft woods and warm amber warmth that creates an inviting calm. The heart unfolds into layers of delicate, refined accords, and a clean musk base provides a smooth, lasting impression.

This balance creates a sensory experience that feels serene, composed, and suitable for a wide range of occasions — from professional settings to personal reflections.

Fragrance Notes:
• Top Notes: Soft woods, warm amber
• Heart Notes: Gentle floral accords
• Base Notes: Clean musk, subtle warmth

Designed For Everyday Calm & Presence

Ameen is ideal for men who value composure, inner peace, and self-assured presence. Its balanced scent profile works beautifully in:

✔ Office & professional settings
✔ Casual daytime elegance
✔ Evening gatherings & social events
✔ Cooler weather preference

The refined composition makes it versatile yet distinctive.

Performance & Wearability

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum
• Longevity: 6–8 hours (varies by skin type)
• Projection: Moderate & refined
• Intensity: Balanced, soft yet noticeable

Ameen stays close to the wearer without overpowering — an ideal signature scent for calm confidence.

Craft & Presentation

Each Ameen bottle is crafted with a matte finish and refined antique-gold accents, reflecting the fragrance’s subtle warmth and elegant presence. Designed with premium craftsmanship in mind, the bottle’s simplicity embodies the composed, balanced character of the scent.

Why Ameen?

Ameen stands apart because it doesn’t compete with loud projection or overpowering notes. Instead, it delivers a sophisticated experience that:

• Evokes inner calm
• Enhances daily confidence
• Complements thoughtful presence
• Leaves a composed memory

For men who carry peace within — Ameen by AnsarOud.
short_description:
Ameen is a serene, refined oud perfume for men blending soft woods, gentle amber, and clean musk.
Crafted for calm confidence and understated presence — balanced for both daily wear and meaningful moments.
price_html: ₹449.00 – ₹1,699.00Price range: ₹449.00 through ₹1,699.00

name: Saif Ul Lah – Eau De Parfum
description:
Saif Ul Lah is a premium oud perfume for men crafted for strength, discipline, and refined masculinity. Designed as a modern woody-leather fragrance, this Eau De Parfum blends depth, structure, and subtle smokiness to create a signature scent that feels confident and composed.

If you are looking for a luxury men’s perfume in India that balances tradition with modern wearability, Saif Ul Lah delivers a powerful yet controlled fragrance experience.

Fragrance Profile – Woody, Leather & Smoky Oud

Saif Ul Lah opens with a crisp and slightly dry freshness that quickly evolves into smooth leather and cedarwood. As the scent settles, warm frankincense, vetiver, and clean musk create a long-lasting, grounded base.

This leather fragrance for men is structured, masculine, and versatile — suitable for both daily wear and evening occasions.

Notes Breakdown:

Top Notes: Dry citrus peel, black pepper
Heart Notes: Leather, cedarwood
Base Notes: Frankincense, vetiver, clean musk

Why Choose Saif Ul Lah?

✔ Premium oud perfume crafted in India
✔ Long lasting Eau De Parfum concentration
✔ Ideal for office, formal events, and special occasions
✔ Masculine woody-leather fragrance profile
✔ Elegant matte black luxury bottle

Saif Ul Lah is designed for men who prefer presence over noise — a scent that remains noticeable without being overpowering.

Performance & Longevity

• Concentration: Eau De Parfum (EDP)
• Longevity: 6–8 hours (skin dependent)
• Projection: Moderate, refined trail

This long lasting perfume for men offers balanced performance suitable for professional and social settings.

A Luxury Oud Fragrance for Modern Men

Saif Ul Lah by AnsarOud represents a new generation of Indian luxury perfumes, combining traditional oud inspiration with contemporary masculine elegance.

Whether you are searching for a signature scent, a leather-based perfume, or a refined oud fragrance in India, Saif Ul Lah stands as a confident and timeless choice.
short_description:
Saif Ul Lah is a premium oud perfume for men crafted with smooth leather, warm woods, and smoky depth.
A refined Eau De Parfum designed for confident, modern masculinity — powerful yet controlled, noticeable yet composed.
